description: You are a logistics planner assessing the winter operating window for heavy machinery transport across the Lena River ice road in Siberia. Following the request at ~/Desktop/ice_road_logistics_request.txt, use NASA Panoply to analyze the NCEP long-term mean air temperature dataset (~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc). Create a 2D geographic map of January air temperature (time index 0) zoomed in on Eastern Siberia and export it to ~/Documents/IceRoads/yakutia_jan_map.png. Generate a 1D Line Plot for the 'air' variable at Yakutsk (62.5°N, 130.0°E) showing temperature across all months and export it to ~/Documents/IceRoads/yakutsk_annual_profile.png. Identify which months fall below the safety threshold of -20°C (253.15 K) and record your findings in ~/Documents/IceRoads/safe_transit_report.txt using the required fields.
